channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass Verge manhole, 8th July
item.description:
Dent of 3ft by 3ft hole damaged, manhole cover pushed through due to a vehicle going over. Please make safe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Lynton Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and overgrown bushes / weeds outside school path, 8th July
item.description:
The path outside school is disgusting ! It is full of litter, overgrown weeds / bushes and low hanging tree branches! There hasn’t been a council road sweeper for months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
Fly tipping of furniture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bronti Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac bubbling up and footpath now uneven, 8th July
item.description:
The brand new tarmac that has just been laid is bubbling and causing a danger on the footpath.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
Garden waste, children's bike and other rubbish fly tipped on the junction of Highland Road and Madeira Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Madeira Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on old tram shed, 8th July
item.description:
The old tram shed at the junction of Cheltenham and Homestall Road have been graffitied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Improperly Parked Lime Bike, 8th July
item.description:
I would like to report a Lime bike that has been left lying in the middle of the road, creating a potential hazard for vehicles, cyclists, and pedestrians. Please could you arrange for it to be removed as soon as possible? I’ve attached a photo showing the location and the issue. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Byron Avenue, Manor Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trespassing, 8th July
item.description:
People set up tent on riverpath and constantly leaving litter and imposing privacy of neighbors
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside 46, 8th July
item.description:
Rubbish outside on street

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin, 8th July
item.description:
Large green wheelie bin has been left on pavement outside flats, owner unknown but in front of numbers 25/27
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mera Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat 242 Rangefield road, 8th July
item.description:
Dead cat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal gener waste bin taken/missing, 8th July
item.description:
Our apartment building at 40 Barrett’s Grove has not had its general waste bin returned since last being emptied and so now rubbish is being dumped in its place. In the heat this is causing a very bad odour and is being torn apart by foxes and rats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barretts Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree branch has fallen onto telephone line, 8th July
item.description:
On green adjacent to 28 Fairmead close. Large tree branch fallen onto teleohone lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still waiting fir a response. Been a month., 8th July
item.description:
9550037... Please can we habe a bollard back in here asap . A cone is not good enough. We are still waiting. This is the 3rd request . The bollard needs to be replaced. Domino's lorries, coop lorries and carpet lorries mount the kerb.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Steynton Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass uncut for too long in Cowper and and surrounding roads, 8th July
item.description:
Grass / weeds untidy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 8th July
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped this time in the usual place
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 8th July
item.description:
This vehicle has been in situ for several months. It is shown as untaxed and the MOT has expired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chestnut Drive, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large exposed hole in pavement where a manhole cover has been stolen, Top of Broomwood road, just by entrance to the flats at Broomfield House., 8th July
item.description:
Large exposed hole in pavement where a manhole cover has been stolen, Top of Broomwood road, just by entrance to the flats at Broomfield House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88-90, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Beacon knocked down, post chopped - needs replacing, 8th July
item.description:
C7 This was knocked down a few months ago. It’s been chopped but still not replaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign missing from post and post leaning, 8th July

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, Poverest, Greater London
